name: aos
when_to_use: 分块滚动进入视口时的进场/揭示动画(落地页、scroll-telling)时用它;on-enter 一次性揭示用它,连续视差用 rellax。你给元素打 data-aos='fade-up' 等属性,AOS.init() 接管滚动触发。
why_valuable: 一套打磨过、久经考验、错峰且缓动正确的 reveal(fade/slide/zoom/flip)配 anchor/offset/once/mirror 逻辑,手写复刻很费劲;裸 scroll observer 很难达到这种成品度。

data_in.note: 动画词表写在元素的 data-aos 上(fade-up/zoom-in/flip-left…),AOS.init(options) 设全局默认。init 用 document.querySelectorAll('[data-aos]'),只认 light DOM。deps(lodash.debounce/throttle、classlist-polyfill)已打进 +esm。

options?.offset?: number —— 触发提前量 px,默认 120
options?.once?: boolean —— 只播一次不回滚,默认 false
options?.mirror?: boolean —— 滚出时反向播放,默认 false
options?.anchorPlacement?: string —— 元素/视口触发锚点,默认 'top-bottom'
options?.disable?: boolean | 'phone' | 'tablet' | 'mobile' | function —— 关闭条件,默认 false

schema._perElementAttrs: data-aos(动画名,必填)· data-aos-delay · data-aos-duration · data-aos-easing · data-aos-anchor · data-aos-once

en.when_to_use: Use it for entrance/reveal animations as page sections scroll into view (landing pages, scroll-telling). Use it for one-time on-enter reveals; use rellax for continuous parallax. Add attributes such as data-aos='fade-up' to elements, then let AOS.init() manage scroll triggers.
en.why_valuable: It provides a polished, battle-tested set of correctly staggered and eased reveals (fade/slide/zoom/flip), together with anchor/offset/once/mirror logic. Reproducing it by hand is laborious, and a bare scroll observer rarely reaches the same finish.

data_in.note: Put the animation vocabulary on each element's data-aos attribute (fade-up/zoom-in/flip-left...), and set global defaults with AOS.init(options). Initialization uses document.querySelectorAll('[data-aos]') and recognizes only light DOM. The dependencies (lodash.debounce/throttle and classlist-polyfill) are bundled into +esm.

options?.offset?: number -- trigger lead distance in px; default 120
options?.once?: boolean -- play only once and do not reverse on scroll-back; default false
options?.mirror?: boolean -- reverse when scrolling out; default false
options?.disable?: boolean | 'phone' | 'tablet' | 'mobile' | function -- disable condition; default false

schema._perElementAttrs: data-aos (animation name; required) * data-aos-delay * data-aos-duration * data-aos-easing * data-aos-anchor * data-aos-once

example._why: 示例是 init 全局默认;真正的动画名/错峰写在各元素 data-aos / data-aos-delay 上。

uplink: 纯 display,无 uplink;进场类切换由 AOS 自管,不外传。

carriers.widget: conditional:AOS.init() 只扫 document [data-aos]、无法限定 shadow,被动元素 + aos.css 须落 light DOM
carriers.codex: supported:light DOM 下 default export + 外链 CSS,无 worker/wasm

isolation.evidence: API correct: +esm 导出(tt as default, rt as AOS)= AOS 对象,方法 init/refresh/refreshHard;deps lodash.debounce/throttle + classlist-polyfill 已打进 +esm。init → document.querySelectorAll('[data-aos]')(document 域,无法限定 shadowRoot),切 aos-init/aos-animate 类;默认已实测:offset 120、duration 400、once false、delay 0、easing 'ease'、startEvent 'DOMContentLoaded'、disable false。globalStyleInjection=no:外链 aos.css(asset 200),库只切类。globalDomMutation=yes:对全 document [data-aos] 元素做类切换(全域发现)。globalEvents=yes:window scroll/resize/orientationchange。shadowCompatible=conditional:仅 light-DOM 发现。
